rulings.Case Title: SAMETC, LLC et al VS. TED AND PAULINE ELMS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 5, 2015 line 1. PETITIONERS SAMETC, LLC and JOHN SOLLNER's Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees GRANTED. Petitioner is the prevailing patty in this action and is entitled to reasonable attorney's fees. Fees are granted in the amount of $26,540. Costs are granted per Memorandum of costs, $1,673.85. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YI YUNG HUANG VS. CHIA-PI TIEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Answer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 5, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT CHIA-PI TIEN's Motion To Amend Answer moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YI YUNG HUANG VS. CHIA-PI TIEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 5, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT CHIA-PI TIEN's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED. Plaintiff's complaint is barred by res judicata The facts, primary right, and damages sought in the small claims complaint and in this action are the same, i.e. existence of a 1-year lease, pre-payment of rent; request for additional payment by the defendant; plaintiff vacating the premises and paying extra for her new accommodations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUE YUE, LLC, VS. ALLISON LEIGH JONES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 5, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT ALLISON JONES' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Verification is sufficient and request for damages is proper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOLE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. LANA BAILEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 5, 2015 line 7. DEFENDANT LANA BAILEY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is no uncertain. = (501/REQ)
